title: Toffee Popcorn Treat
description: A sweet vegan treat made with toffee and popcorn, perfect for a quick snack.
instructions: 1. Pop the popcorn kernels in a large pot or a popcorn popper.
2. Melt the coconut oil in a saucepan over low heat.
3. Add the toffee and melted chocolate to the saucepan, stirring constantly.
4. Pour the toffee mixture over the popped popcorn and stir until well combined.
5. Sprinkle salt and chopped nuts (if using) over the popcorn mixture.
6. Let the mixture cool until the chocolate has set.
7. Break the toffee popcorn into clusters and serve.
